description_long: This is a luxury wristwatch featuring a rose gold-toned metal case with a deep blue dial and matching blue alligator-patterned leather strap. The dial is adorned with three subdials, slender metallic hour markers, and luminous hands, giving it a chronograph style. The watch's crown and pushers are located on the right side of the case, crafted in the same rose gold finish. The strap is stitched with white thread and has a smooth, tan underside for comfort. The brand logo and name are prominently displayed below the 12 o'clock position on the dial. The overall design is elegant and modern, suitable for both formal and urban casual settings.
description: A rose gold chronograph wristwatch with a deep blue dial and blue alligator-patterned leather strap, featuring three subdials and luminous hands.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue dial, three subdials, rose gold case, and brand logo below 12 o'clock.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the rose gold case, crown, and pushers, as well as the curved blue strap.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the blue alligator-patterned strap with white stitching and the buckle.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the strap's tan underside and the profile of the case and pushers.
attribute_brand_logo: A small metallic emblem and the text 'AKRIBOS' are present below the 12 o'clock position on the dial.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is deep blue with metallic hour indices, three subdials arranged in a chronograph layout, slender luminous hands, and a subtle minute track around the edge. The style is modern chronograph with a polished finish.
attribute_strap_type: Blue alligator-patterned leather strap with white stitching and a tan underside.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three central hands (hour, minute, second) and three subdials for chronograph functions; no digital elements.
